basic_details.job_title: NABCONS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Manager, Associate Project Consultant Posts
basic_details.short_information: NABARD Consultancy Services (NABCONS) has released the official Project Manager & Associate Project Consultant Recruitment 2026 notification under Advt No. NABCONS/CO-HR/12/PBCS/2026-27 on its official website. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the NABCONS Project Manager & Associate Project Consultant Recruitment 2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Up to 45 years for Project Managers and up to 35 years for APC positions.
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 45 years | Maximum Age: 35 years

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate in Finance, Rural Development and related fields for Project Manager. Graduate/ Post Graduate in IT/ Computer sciences for Associate Project Consultant.
qualification.details: Post Graduate in Finance, Rural Development and related fields. Experience: 5-7 years of experience in project management and operations of IT, Banking or Finance related government projects | Graduate/ Post Graduate in IT/ Computer sciences Experience: Between 3 - 5 years of experience in IT related projects.

salary_details.pay_scale: Project Manager: 1.25 to 1.50 Lakh per month. Associate Project Consultant: Rs. 60,000/- to Rs. 75,000/- per month.
salary_details.details: Project Manager: 1.25 to 1.50 Lakh per month Associate Project Consultant: Rs. 60,000/- to Rs. 75,000/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NABCONS Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 14-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NABCONS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.nabard_consultancy_services_nabcons: Project Manager: 1.25 to 1.50 Lakh per month. Associate Project Consultant: Rs. 60,000/- to Rs. 75,000/- per month.
Post Graduate in Finance, Rural Development and related fields for Project Manager. Graduate/ Post Graduate in IT/ Computer sciences for Associate Project Consultant.
Up to 45 years for Project Managers and up to 35 years for APC positions.

content_sections.heading: NABCONS Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NABCONS Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NABCONS Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Post Graduate in Finance, Rural Development and related fields. Experience: 5-7 years of experience in project management and operations of IT, Banking or Finance related government projects Graduate/ Post Graduate in IT/ Computer sciences Experience: Between 3 - 5 years of experience in IT related projects.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 45 years Maximum Age: 35 years

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Project Manager: 1.25 to 1.50 Lakh per month Associate Project Consultant: Rs. 60,000/- to Rs. 75,000/- per month

rows.event: Last date for submission of online applications

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NABCONS Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 14-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NABCONS to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.link_description: Apply Online for Associate Project Consultant

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NABCONS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit online applications for NABCONS Project Manager and Associate Project Consultant posts is 14 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in NABCONS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies, including 1 for Project Manager and 4 for Associate Project Consultant positions at NABCONS.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for NABCONS Project Manager posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for NABCONS Project Manager and Associate Project Consultant positions is strictly online through the official website.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for a Project Manager at NABCONS?
faq.answer: Project Managers at NABCONS can expect a total monthly CTC ranging from 1.25 Lakh to 1.50 Lakh.

faq.question: Q5. What are the age limits for Project Manager and Associate Project Consultant?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 45 years for Project Managers and 35 years for Associate Project Consultants as per the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What are the required qualifications for Project Manager?
faq.answer: Candidates for Project Manager must hold a Post Graduate degree in Finance, Rural Development, or other related fields.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for NABCONS Project Manager Recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for these project-based positions at NABCONS primarily involves an interview with eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the job location be for these NABCONS posts?
faq.answer: The primary job location for these positions is Mumbai, with projects potentially spanning Across India.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for NABCONS 2026 recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for the NABCONS Project Manager and Associate Project Consultant posts.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for NABCONS Project Manager and Associate Project Consultant positions?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official NABCONS website (www.nabcons.com) by the specified deadline of 14 July 2026.
